procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1134.005
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1134.005 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: Addition of SID History to Active Directory Object

osquery.name: t1134_005_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1134_005_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1134_005_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

sigma_matches.title: Addition of SID History to Active Directory Object

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 2 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 3 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 3 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
